brand_context.source_of_truth: Amazon Main Image A1 + user corrections

identity_lock.core_identity: kawaii stylization of the real product, not a generic toy
identity_lock.recognition_goal: same mascot first, new pose second
identity_lock.relationship_to_real_product: must stay faithful to the Amazon Main product architecture

real_product_canonical_structure.top_green_zone: green cap section above the rope
real_product_canonical_structure.bottom_green_zone: green cap section below the rope
real_product_canonical_structure.top_attachment: long beige-golden feathers emerging from the top
real_product_canonical_structure.top_secondary_attachment: small dark brown suspended natural element near the top
real_product_canonical_structure.bottom_attachment: short raffia bundle at the bottom
real_product_canonical_structure.asymmetry_rule: top and bottom are intentionally different

main_body.readability: must remain clearly identifiable as the product body

rope_zone.face_rule: never place facial features on the rope

green_zones.face_rule: facial features must always be placed on the top green zone

brown_element.description: small dark brown suspended natural element near the top

raffia.description: short raffia/fiber bundle at the bottom

face_rules.placement: always on the top green zone only
constraints: no face on the lower green zone

legs.lock: the mascot must have two legs

palette_rules: keep colors warm, natural, and soft

proportions.body_shape: slim vertical or slightly tilted cylinder
proportions.top_green_zone: large enough to hold the full face clearly
proportions.rope_zone: centered and visually less important than the face zone
proportions.limb_scale: small and cute compared with the body
proportions.raffia_scale: smaller than the top feather cluster

pose_rules.grounding_rule: if the pose implies standing or running, the leg placement must remain plausible
pose_rules.consistency_rule: pose may change, but the product architecture must stay stable

must_remain_stable: small brown suspended element near the top

forbidden_drift: face on the bottom green zone
rope becoming the main body identity
generic toy unrelated to the real product

framing: keep full mascot visible when possible
composition_rules.shadow: soft simple ground shadow only if needed
composition_rules.readability: must remain clear at small size

prompt_builder.base_prompt: Cute anthropomorphic product mascot in a kawaii sticker-like 2D illustration style, based on the real product: a slim cylindrical toy with a central beige rope wrap, green top and bottom caps, long beige-golden feathers at the top, a small dark brown suspended natural element near the top, and a raffia bundle at the bottom. Thick dark brown outline, warm natural palette, simple vector-like rendering, two green arms, two green legs, and all facial features placed only on the top green zone.
consistency_addons: same asymmetry as the real product
negative_constraints: no face on the lower green section

quality_checklist: Does it still clearly look like the real product mascot?
Is the face entirely on the top green zone?
Is the rope visible but secondary?
Is the small brown suspended element near the top present?
Is the bottom raffia bundle present?
Are there two arms and two legs?
Are the arms and legs green?
Is the outline thick and dark brown?
Does the product remain asymmetrical top vs bottom?
